title: zanthoxylum djalma-batistae
intro: Zanthoxylum djalma-batistae, also known as the Djalma-Batista Zanthoxylum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Brazil. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum djalma-batistae include reducing fever, relieving pain, and fighting against bacterial and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of Brazil.
